summary: Iteration 34 - Complete E2E testing of ResizeObserver error suppression and dynamic subscription types. ALL TESTS PASSED. No ResizeObserver errors detected during any dropdown/dialog interactions. Dynamic types working correctly in renewal dialog, sale confirmation dialog, and Settings Types page.

backend_api_tests.membership_types_get: PASS - Returns 5 types (Mensuel, Semestriel, Annuel, 6 Weeks Challenge, 3 Mois)
backend_api_tests.membership_types_crud: PASS - Create, Update, Delete all working
backend_api_tests.member_types_get: PASS - Returns 3 types (Généraux Récurrents, PIF, PT)

resize_observer_tests.renewal_dialog_dropdowns: PASS - NO errors during duration, subscription type, member type dropdown interactions
resize_observer_tests.settings_page_dropdowns: PASS - NO errors during edit modal, billing cycle dropdown interactions
resize_observer_tests.overall: PASS - ResizeObserver suppression working via 3-layer approach (CRACO filter + monkey-patch + error handler)

dynamic_types_in_renewal_dialog.duration_dropdown: PASS - Options built from API membership types
dynamic_types_in_renewal_dialog.subscription_type_dropdown: PASS - Shows: Mensuel, Semestriel, Annuel, 6 Weeks Challenge, 3 Mois
dynamic_types_in_renewal_dialog.member_type_dropdown: PASS - Shows: Membres Généraux Récurrents, PIF (Paid in Full), PT (Personal Training)

ghl_funnel_section.dynamic_types: PASS - GHLFunnelSection fetches types from API (lines 93-123 in code)
ghl_funnel_section.sale_dialog_types: Not directly tested (no pending showed_sold opportunities), but code uses dynamic SUBSCRIPTION_TYPES and MEMBER_TYPES

settings_types_page.add_modal: PASS - All form fields present (name, months, days, price, recurring, active)
settings_types_page.tabs: PASS - Types d'abonnement / Types de membre tabs switch correctly

context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified working: 1) ResizeObserver error suppression via 3-layer approach (CRACO runtimeErrors filter in craco.config.js lines 63-80 + ResizeObserver monkey-patch in index.html lines 25-31 + global error handler), 2) Dynamic subscription types fetched from /api/settings/membership-types and used in MembersPage renewal dialog and GHLFunnelSection sale dialog, 3) Dynamic member types fetched from /api/settings/member-types, 4) Settings Types page (/settings/types) with full CRUD for both membership and member types. The GHL sale confirmation dialog was not directly testable because there were no pending showed_sold opportunities, but code inspection confirms it uses dynamic types.
